title: micradenia sellowii
intro: Micradenia sellowii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Sellow's micradenia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Micradenia sellowii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Micradenia sellowii are typically made from its leaves, which are used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to promote health benefits such as improved immune function and relief from skin irritations.
